summary: This video captures a Ramadan prayer session at the Muslim Community Center of Tucson, featuring the recitation of Quranic verses and the performance of Taraweeh (night) prayers during the holy month. The session includes recitation of Surah Al-Fatihah, Surah Al-Qadr (Chapter 97), and other Quranic passages, along with Islamic supplications and duas. The video also contains brief commentary on fasting practices and religious guidance related to Ramadan observance.
suggested_title: Ramadan Taraweeh Prayer and Quranic Recitation - Muslim Community Center of Tucson
catchy_title: Night Prayer: Quranic Recitation in Ramadan
